method_full_name: Human-Induced Regeneration of a permanent even-aged native forest
key_critique_references: Macintosh et al. (2022) ANU working papers; Butler-Verstegen et al. (2023) response
notes: Chubb Review panel recommended replacement by Integrated Farm and Land Management (IFLM). High-volume method; academic debate about additionality of regeneration vs pre-existing growth.
Closed to new project registrations post-Chubb. Existing projects continue to accrue credits to end of crediting period.
Continued active but with enhanced Integrity Assurance Committee (IAC) oversight.

method_full_name: Measurement Based Methods for New Farm Forestry Plantations

notes: Crediting period ended 30 September 2024. Superseded by Plantings 2024 FullCAM.
Successor method to Plantings 2014; uses updated FullCAM model.
Superseded by Savanna Fire Management 2026 method. Widely considered one of the highest-integrity methods.

method_full_name: Savanna Fire Management: Emissions Avoidance + Sequestration 2018
notes: Companion method to EA 2018; superseded by 2026.
Unified successor method. High scientific confidence in baseline and measurement.
Emissions-avoidance via feed and breeding efficiency.

key_critique_references: Academic debate on measurement uncertainty and permanence; Chubb (2022) recommended tightened measurement protocols
notes: Chubb Review recommended stronger Measurement Reporting and Verification (MRV); debate on detection threshold.

key_critique_references: Baseline-setting concerns; NGER Safeguard facility overlap
notes: Widely used; baseline-crediting methodology debated. Some facilities also Safeguard-covered (overlap risk).
Methane capture from coal mine workings.

method_full_name: Tidal restoration of blue carbon ecosystems
notes: New method; limited project pipeline to date.
